# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice_name # replace with your actual MicroService Name here, e.g., user-management or product-catalog etc...
spec:
  replicas: YOUR REPLICAS COUNT HERE  
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices/YOUR MICROSERVICE NAME # replace with your actual MicroService Name here, e.g., user_management or product-catalog etc...    
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: ${PROJECT_NAME}/${MICROSERVICE}   # use the same as above to match it in Kubernetes and Istio sidecar injection. e.g., user/user-management or product/product-catalog etc... 
    spec:    
      containers:      
        - name: ${PROJECT_NAME}/$MICROSERVICE   # use the same as above to match it in Kubernetes and Istio sidecar injection. e.g., user-management or product-catalog etc ...        
          image: YOUR IMAGE HERE  # replace with your actual Docker Image here, for example registry/user_service:1.0  
      annotations:    
        "sidecar.istio.io/inject": $(SIDECAR_INJECT)    # use 'true' or 'false'. This will enable sidecar injection if set to true and disable it otherwise  e.g., false, true etc...
